title: Verify State and Copy for Paused/Cancelled Trial Corner
description: Tests the UI state of the Trial Corner hub after a user has paused or cancelled their trial.
preconditions: User has already paused or cancelled their trial.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the homepage and click the 'paused' or 'cancelled' state widget.
2. Verify the user is taken to the Trial Corner hub.
3. Verify the Hero section correctly displays the 'Paused' or 'Cancelled' trial status.
4. Verify the 'Progress & Benefits', 'Engagement', and 'Trending' content sections are visually locked or disabled.
5. Verify the 'Manage Trial' section shows appropriate options for the state (e.g., 'Resume' for paused, 'Re-subscribe' for cancelled).

expected_result: The Trial Corner hub accurately reflects the user's trial status (Paused/Cancelled) with all content sections locked and appropriate management options displayed.
